title: Bridge Essay: The Rubber Hand Illusion: Top-down attention modulates embodiment.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through The, Rubber, Hand, Illusion:, Top-down.

**The Rubber Hand Illusion: Top-down attention modulates embodiment.** — Q J Exp Psychol (Hove). PMID: 35073801. DOI: 10.1177/17470218221078858. The Rubber Hand Illusion (RHI) creates distortions of body ownership through multimodal integration of somatosensory and visual inputs. This illusion largely rests on bottom-up (automatic multisensory and perceptual integration) mechanisms. However, the relative contribution from top-down factors, such as controlled processes involving attentional regulation, remains unclear. Following previous work that highlights the putative influence of higher-order cognition in the RHI, we aimed to further
